final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing interior illustration of a dark gothic castle.

Style/medium: needs a dark gothic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include towering vaulted ceilings as the dominant architectural feature
Subject: must include candelabras and iron chains as decorative elements
Scene/backdrop: must be a castle interior with tall vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows
Lighting/mood: needs a mysterious, oppressive atmosphere with blood-red light filtering through stained glass — exact light source mix and shadow density are yours
Color palette: must be blood-red dominant with heavy shadows
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
